---
title: "Testing the empathy theory of dreaming: The relationships between dream sharing and trait and state empathy"
authors: "Blagrove, M., Hale, S., Lockheart, J., Carr, M., Jones, A. L., & Valli, K."
year: 2019
date: 2019-01-01
pub-journal: "Frontiers in Psychology"
volume: "10"
pages: "1351"
doi: "10.3389/fpsyg.2019.01351"
pdf: "assets/papers/2019/Blagrove_etal_2019.pdf"
categories: [other]
---
